name: session-start-context-injection
description: SessionStart hook that reads data files and injects intelligence context via hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext

name: post-edit-tracker
description: PostToolUse hook (Edit|Write|MultiEdit) that tracks file changes, detects churn, and logs risk signals
template: python stdin parser with risk classification

name: session-stop-learner
description: Stop hook that reads transcript tail, extracts patterns via regex, calculates health score, writes to multiple data files
template: python transcript analyzer with scoring algorithm

name: pre-tool-guard
description: PreToolUse hook that checks tool calls against hardcoded + learned anti-patterns, outputs systemMessage warnings
template: python rule engine with suppression support

name: prompt-intelligence
description: UserPromptSubmit hook that detects scope creep, repetitive prompts, and user feedback signals
template: python keyword extraction with threshold checks

name: pre-compact-preserver
description: PreCompact hook that saves decisions, blueprint state, and warns about context loss
template: python transcript scanner with decision extraction

name: read-only-analyst
description: Sonnet-tier agent with Read, Grep, Glob, Bash tools for analysis without modification
template: frontmatter: model: sonnet, tools: Read, Grep, Glob, Bash

name: write-capable-generator
description: Sonnet-tier agent with full tool access for file generation
template: frontmatter: model: sonnet, tools: Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob, Bash

name: fast-validator
description: Haiku-tier agent for quick validation passes
template: frontmatter: model: haiku, tools: Read, Grep, Glob, Bash

name: self-modifier
description: Opus-tier agent with Write/Edit access to plugin files for self-evolution
template: frontmatter: model: opus, tools: Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob, Bash

name: deep-skill-template
description: Full standalone skill with multi-section instructions, data file references, and output format
template: YAML frontmatter (name, description, version) + 50-200 line instruction body

name: thin-wrapper-template
description: Minimal skill that parses $ARGUMENTS and delegates to agents or other skills
template: YAML frontmatter (description, argument-hint) + 10-30 line routing logic

name: standard-config
description: JSON config with version, thresholds, suppressed_warnings, project_overrides, and stats sections

name: standard-installer
description: 4-step installer: validate structure, init data+permissions, validate Python syntax, print summary
template: bash with required_files array and py_compile validation
